data.body: Implement OpenCode on top of the shared interactive session protocol instead of treating it only as . Choose a stable interactive/headless entrypoint that can participate in claimed-step and take-loop sessions, keep stdin or equivalent follow-up transport open for subsequent turns, normalize OpenCode events into the shared event model, and enforce the same close-input, process-exit, watchdog, retry, and post-exit validation rules as other interactive agents.
data.title: Add interactive OpenCode session support
